fields.name: 1. General Information 💬
fields.value:
● How old are you?
● How long have you been on Discord?
● How much time do you spend on Discord/week?
● Which role are you applying for?

fields.name: 2. Experience and Motivations 🕒
fields.value:
● Have you ever been part of a staff? If yes, what role(s) did you hold?
● (Answer if the previous answer is affirmative). How long did you hold this/these role(s)?
● Why do you want to be part of the staff?
● Why this server in particular?

fields.name: 3. Moderation 🔒
fields.value:
● A conflict starts in front of you. What do you do?
● You arrive in the middle of a conflict without knowing the reason. What do you do?
● How do you handle negative criticism?
● A close friend does not respect the server rules. What do you do specifically?
● What do you do if you disagree with a staff member?

fields.name: 4. Details 📋
fields.value:
● How much time per day are you willing to dedicate to this server?
● Are there periods during the year when you will not be available? (holidays, exams, curfew, etc.).
● In your opinion, what qualities are required to be part of the staff?

footer.text: Questions containing '•' are mandatory. The rest is optional.
